# Manual Modern Japanese Samples

## Status

Small loose external/unknown image set moved from:

```text
data/corpora/ad_hoc/modern_japanese/original/
```

These files were already tracked before this organization pass. They are moved
as existing project data, but provenance is still unclear.

## Source / Provenance

Local filenames observed:

- `istockphoto-1015263364-612x612.jpg`
- `S__34193423.jpg`
- `JapText2.jpg`

Provenance unknown — do not treat as canonical yet.

## Contents

Three image files under `original/`.

## Intended Use

Possible qualitative OCR smoke tests or visual examples if source/license are
confirmed.

## Not Intended For

Not suitable for quantitative evaluation without ground truth. Do not add more
images of this kind or redistribute outside the repository until licensing is
clear.

## Local Files

Payload files under `original/` are ignored by default for new files. The three
pre-existing tracked images remain tracked after the move.

## Manifest

Use `manifests/manifest.example.json` if creating a local manifest.

## Notes / Open Questions

- Confirm source/license for each image.
- Decide whether these should remain in the project at all after the modern
  OCR evaluation manifest is built.
